meta.title: WAHM — Learn from the best
meta.description: World Academy of Human Movement: the global marketplace for training in health, sport, wellness and performance, in the language of your choice.

hero.label: The global platform for human movement
hero.tagline: From anywhere. In the language of your choice.
hero.text: Access the world's most innovative courses in sports coaching, health, rehabilitation, Pilates, yoga and human performance. One platform. One standard of expertise. A global community of passionate professionals.

pourquoiCards.title: World-class experts
pourquoiCards.description: Renowned experts from around the world in movement science, performance and health.

pourquoiCards.title: Exclusive content
pourquoiCards.description: Original training you won't find anywhere else.

pourquoiCards.title: Multilingual
pourquoiCards.description: Instant voice translation that automatically delivers a dubbed version while keeping the original voice, in multiple languages.

pourquoiCards.title: Global access
pourquoiCards.description: Immediate access from any country and on any device.

pourquoiCards.title: Community
pourquoiCards.description: A community of coaches, therapists and enthusiasts who share the same values: progress, excellence, impact.

pourquoi.label: Why WAHM?
pourquoi.title: Global excellence, accessible to everyone
pourquoi.intro: At World Academy of Human Movement, we only select courses that have already transformed thousands of professionals around the world. WAHM is not a marketplace like the others: it is the international meeting point between:
pourquoi.outro: WAHM opens the doors to global knowledge, structured, verified and designed for your professional growth.
